steps.spec: S6.3: exact doc-lattice and launcher resolution runs first.
S6.3: the dispatcher rule (S6.1) applies before any head look-alike.
S6.3: a marker-matching head that is not doc-lattice or a launcher refuses here.
S6.3: the existing off-floor wrapper handling applies next.
S6.3: a command matching no earlier stage is not a candidate.
